import React, { useEffect } from "react"; import { Leaf, Award, Cpu, Heart, Star, Cookie, CheckCircle2, } from "lucide-react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import { useTranslation } from "react-i18next"; import "./AboutUs2.css"; export default function AboutUs() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const { t, i18n } = useTranslation(); // هذا الجزء هو المسؤول عن قلب الصفحة لليمين في العربي ولليسار في الإنجليزي useEffect(() => { const dir = i18n.language === "ar" ? "rtl" : "ltr"; document.documentElement.dir = dir; }, [i18n.language]); return (
{/* Hero Section */}
{t("about_hero_badge")}

{t("about_hero_title")}
{t("about_hero_highlight")}

{t("about_hero_desc")}

{t("about_taste_unresistable")}
😋
{/* Story Section */}

{t("about_story_title")}

{t("about_story_text1")}

{t("about_story_text2")}

{/* Quality Section */}

{t("about_quality_title")}{" "} {t("about_quality_highlight")}

{t("about_quality_desc")}

{t("about_feat1_title")}

{t("about_feat1_desc")}

{t("about_feat2_title")}

{t("about_feat2_desc")}

{t("about_feat3_title")}

{t("about_feat3_desc")}

{t("about_feat4_title")}

{t("about_feat4_desc")}

); }
